description_long: This chaise features a modern, angular design with a geometric black and white patterned upholstery. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned, providing a comfortable lounging surface, while the backrest wraps around the sides, forming a semi-enclosed seating area. The upholstery is adorned with a striking network of white lines forming irregular polygonal shapes, giving it a contemporary and stylish appearance. The legs are slender, angled, and appear to be made of light-colored wood or a similar material, providing both support and a visual contrast to the dark fabric. The overall structure is low to the ground, with a wide seat and a slightly reclined backrest for relaxation. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, modern outdoor lounges, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A modern chaise with black and white geometric upholstery, cushioned seat and backrest, and angled light-colored legs. The design is contemporary and comfortable, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the wide, cushioned seat and the enveloping backrest with geometric patterned fabric.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the angled, light-colored legs and the continuous geometric upholstery wrapping around the back.
description_view_2: Side-rear view displaying the depth of the seat, the slant of the backrest, and the structural support of the legs.
description_view_3: Front-side view emphasizing the plush seat, the semi-enclosed backrest, and the modern upholstery pattern.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, slightly reclined, and wraps around the sides to form a semi-enclosed seating area. It is fully upholstered with the same geometric patterned fabric as the seat, with no visible segmentation or decorative buttons.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has integrated armrests formed by the extended sides of the backrest, providing support on both the left and right.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, angled outward, and appear to be made of light-colored wood or a similar material. They have a simple, functional design with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a bold geometric pattern with white lines forming irregular polygons on a black background, giving it a modern and visually striking appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, attached cushion covering the seat and backrest area, providing a continuous and plush lounging surface with no separate or loose cushions visible.
